legislation.title: ASF ORDINANCE
legislation.author: Carlito N. Sagocsoc
legislation.synopsis: AN ORDINANCE SETTING GUIDELINES TO THE PRE-EMPTIVE MEASURES FOR THE CONTAINMENT OF ASF VIRUS AND INSTITUTIONALIZING/STRENGTHENING THE BANTAY ASF SA BARANGAY (BABay) TASK FORCE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CATARMAN, CAMIGUIN, AND IMPOSING PENALTIES THEREOF.

legislation.title: DISPENSING OF MEDICINES
legislation.author: Cathyrine Lopez-Galos
legislation.synopsis:
AN ORDINANCE REGULATING THE DISPENSING, PEDDLING, SELLING
AND RESELLING OF PHARMACEUTICAL PRODUCTS IN SARI-SARI
STORES AND OTHER MICRO CONVENIENCE STORES IN THE
MUNICIPALITY OF CATARMAN.

legislation.title: NO SMOKING
legislation.author: Cathyrine Lopez-Galos
legislation.synopsis:
AN ORDINANCE REVISING ORDINANCE NO. 01, SERIES OF 2017, ENTITLED: AN
ORDINANCE BANNING THE USE AND SMOKING OF CIGARS, E-CIGARETTES, CIGARETTES
AND OTHER TOBACCO PRODUCTS INPUBLIC PLACES, PUBLIC BUILDINGS, PUBLIC
UTILITY VEHICLES AND OTHER LIKE AREAS, PROVIDING FINES AND PENALTIES THEREOF
AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.

legislation.title: TREE PLANTING
legislation.author: Carlito N. Sagocsoc
legislation.synopsis:
AN DECLARING AUGUST 30 EVERY YEAR, AS ARBOR DAY OR
TREE PLANTING DAY, IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CATARMAN, AND
PROVIDING FUNDS FOR THE PURPOSE THEREOF.
